title: "Week" type data visible in Calendar
excerpt: Some tasks are not to be done on a specific date, they just have to be done in a specific week. You created a great week-type column, but I can’t use is if I don’t see its data in my calendar.

posts.author: Chrum (Chrum)
posts.cookedHtml: Some tasks are not to be done on a specific date, they just have to be done in a specific week. You created a great week-type column, but I can’t use is if I don’t see its data in my calendar.
